mapper.sql: id, vin, production_time, plant_code, brand_code, platform_code, car_line_code, model_code, variant_code, configuration_code, source_event_id, source_version, source_event_time, last_sync_time, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_vehicle_projection ( id, vin, production_time, plant_code, brand_code, platform_code, car_line_code, model_code, variant_code, configuration_code, source_event_id, source_version, source_event_time, last_sync_time, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{vin}, #{productionTime}, #{plantCode}, #{brandCode}, #{platformCode}, #{carLineCode}, #{modelCode}, #{variantCode}, #{configurationCode}, #{sourceEventId}, #{sourceVersion}, #{sourceEventTime}, #{lastSyncTime}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO tb_vehicle_projection ( id, vin, production_time, plant_code, brand_code, platform_code, car_line_code, model_code, variant_code, configuration_code, source_event_id, source_version, source_event_time, last_sync_time, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.vin}, #{item.productionTime}, #{item.plantCode}, #{item.brandCode}, #{item.platformCode}, #{item.carLineCode}, #{item.modelCode}, #{item.variantCode}, #{item.configurationCode}, #{item.sourceEventId}, #{item.sourceVersion}, #{item.sourceEventTime}, #{item.lastSyncTime}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_vehicle_projection t SET
t.vin = #{vin},
t.production_time = #{productionTime},
t.plant_code = #{plantCode},
t.brand_code = #{brandCode},
t.platform_code = #{platformCode},
t.car_line_code = #{carLineCode},
t.model_code = #{modelCode},
t.variant_code = #{variantCode},
t.configuration_code = #{configurationCode},
t.source_event_id = #{sourceEventId},
t.source_version = #{sourceVersion},
t.source_event_time = #{sourceEventTime},
t.last_sync_time = now(),
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_vehicle_projection t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_vehicle_projection t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_vehicle_projection t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM tb_vehicle_projection t WHERE t.vin = #{vin} AND t.row_valid = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM tb_vehicle_projection t WHERE t.vin = #{vin} AND t.row_valid = 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_vehicle_projection t SET t.production_time = #{productionTime}, t.plant_code = #{plantCode}, t.brand_code = #{brandCode}, t.platform_code = #{platformCode}, t.car_line_code = #{carLineCode}, t.model_code = #{modelCode}, t.variant_code = #{variantCode}, t.configuration_code = #{configurationCode}, t.source_event_id = #{sourceEventId}, t.source_version = #{sourceVersion}, t.source_event_time = #{sourceEventTime}, t.last_sync_time = now(), t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.vin = #{vin} AND t.source_version < #{sourceVersion} AND t.row_valid = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_vehicle_projection t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM tb_vehicle_projection t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 ${ew.customSqlSegment}
